title: The Artisan's Update — Binding, Mail, Mythic+ Affixes & QoL
changes: Mail System — Gold + Items an andere Spieler schicken (5g Porto, 30 Tage Ablauf)
Kanai's Cube — Legendary-Effekte permanent extrahieren und in 3 Kategorie-Slots ausrüsten
Mythic+ Affixes — 10 wöchentlich rotierende Modifikatoren ab M+2 (Tyrannisch, Nekrotisch, Rasend...)
BoP/BoE Binding — 1.074 Items mit Bind on Equip oder Bind on Pickup getagged
Enchant Vellums — Handelbare Verzauberungs-Pergamente vom Verzauberer (3 Stufen)
Item Lock — Schütze Items vor versehentlichem Salvage, Trade oder Discard
Auto-Salvage — Preview-Grid mit Rarity-Tabs und 2-Schritt-Bestätigung
Material Storage — Eigener Tab im Artisan's Quarter mit Suchfunktion (kein Inventar-Cap)
Recipe Discovery — Unentdeckte Rezepte als ??? mit Source-Hints + Entdeckungs-Counter

Level-Gating — Features schalten sich progressiv frei: Lv1 Quests+Character+Social, Lv3 Challenges+Bazaar, Lv5 Forge+Gacha, Lv8 Rift+Leaderboard, Lv10 Factions+Season Pass, Lv12 Dungeons, Lv15 World Boss
Nav-Notification Badges — Rote Zahlen auf Tabs für ausstehende Aktionen
Timer-Übersicht im Today Drawer — Weekly Reset, Season Ende, aktive Inhalte
NEW Badges auf Inventar-Items + Craftability Icons auf Rezepten (●/◐/○)
Battle Pass Claim All + Mail Collect All — Bulk-Aktionen für weniger Klicks
Batch Craft Animation — Sequentielles Reveal statt Instant-Ergebnis
Tutorial erweitert — Gems, Binding, Cube, WB, Dungeons, Factions, BP, Mail hinzugefügt
8 Tooltip-Einträge hinzugefügt — Mail, Binding, Lock, Cube, Affixe, Salvage, Storage, Vellums
Rarity-Farben standardisiert — Legendary überall einheitlich #f97316
Gold-Formatierung mit Tausender-Trennung — 1500 → 1,500
6 Race Condition Locks + 9 leere Catch-Blocks gefixt
Performance: CSS GPU-Compositing, Date.now() statt new Date(), Code-Cleanup

title: Quality of Life — Tooltips, Flavor & Fixes
changes: 98 Item Flavor Texts — jedes Item hat jetzt atmosphärische Beschreibungen
Gear Hover Tooltips — Name, Rarity, Stats und Beschreibung beim Hovern
Stats Tooltips — Klick auf Kraft/Weisheit/Ausdauer/Glück erklärt den Effekt
Companion Bond Info — Bond Level, XP-Fortschritt und nächste Stufe sichtbar
Active Passives Section — ausgerüstete Passiv-Items unter dem Gear Grid
Bug Fix: Hintergrundbild im Character Screen nicht mehr oben abgeschnitten
Bug Fix: Klassen-Anzeige zeigt jetzt den Namen statt der ID
Locked Quests Section entfernt — Quests unter deinem Level tauchen einfach nicht auf
Feedback API: PATCH Endpoint zum Resolven von Feedback-Einträgen

title: The Item System Overhaul — Equip, Consume & Loot
changes: Item Template System — 98 unified item definitions with types, rarities, effects
Consumable items now work! Gold, XP, Bond, Streak Shields, Forge Temp & more
Equipment from Gacha/Loot can now be equipped — not just shop items
Unequip returns items to inventory (no more item loss!)
Active Buff system — timed effects like XP boost, Gold 2x, Essenz boost
Discard items with confirmation dialog
Click inventory items → Action popup (Use / Equip / Discard)
Consume feedback toast (non-blocking)
Stats now have real effects: Kraft→+XP, Weisheit→+Gold, Ausdauer→less Forge decay
Passive Gacha effects active: Rarity boost, Pity reduction, Streak recovery
29 new pixel art loot item icons (128x128)
9 new NPC reward item icons with pixelated rendering
NPC reward items upgraded — better stats + unique passive effects
Level requirement shown in item tooltips
image-rendering: pixelated for all icons — crisp pixel art at every size
3 new NPCs: Der Elegante Herr, Vex die Archivarin, Captain Flint
50 new quest templates (248 total) — more variety, more easter eggs
Pet feedback text removed (button no longer jumps around)
Class selection fix in profile endpoint

title: Alpha Feedback Batch — Bugs, UI Polish & New Features
changes: Level-lock on quests enforced — quests above your level are now properly gated
Ritual extend tracker fix — commitment extensions now track correctly
Season Pass set to Coming Soon — placeholder until full implementation
Quest duplicate fix — prevented duplicate quests from appearing in pool
Stat card tooltips reworked — click-to-open popups replace hover tooltips
NPC feedback panel selector expanded — more NPC options in feedback mode
Quest pool cap enforced — max 11 open quests at a time
NPC departure styling — red banner on departing NPCs
Level up celebration animation — visual fanfare on level up
Companion quest completion feedback — Dobbie reacts to quest completions
Popout windows: ESC + click-outside + viewport centered — consistent modal behavior
Quest refresh button green glow — visual indicator for pool refresh
Quest difficulties adjusted — rebalanced quest difficulty ratings
XP info panel added to Quest Board — transparent XP breakdown display
Exponential XP scaling curve
Quest favorites system — star icon to favorite quests, sort to top
Version tracking + New Version popup — notifies players of new releases
Expandable changelog — accordion-style version history

title: Quest Hall Launch — Core Systems Online
changes: Quest Board with 198 quest templates across 6 categories
NPC quest giver system with rotating visitors
Player progression with XP, gold, and streaks
Class system with skill trees
Companion system with bond levels
Ritual & Anti-Ritual tracking
Gacha banner system
Leaderboard and achievements
Campaign quest chains
Equipment and inventory system
